response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music present; audio is pure gameplay commentary. 2. JSON Usage: Conducted 100% manual transcription of English gameplay commentary since the reference JSON contained no lyrics. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully around casual conversation pauses, laughter, and game-triggered reactions. Used logical grouping for readability.
